name: Cottage Cheese & Pineapple Roll Ups.
recipeIngredient: 2 ounces (60 g) low fat cottage cheese with pineapple
Quarter ounce (7 g) chopped unsalted almonds or peanuts
recipeInstructions:
1. Spread the low fat spread evenly on both bread slices. Reserve 2 teaspoons of cottage cheese and divide the rest among the bread, spreading to cover the surface. Roll up each slice into a sausage shape.
2. Mash the reserved cottage cheese with a teaspoon until smooth. Spread it along the length of each roll. Lightly toast the chopped nuts and sprinkle them over each roll. Serve immediately.
Preparation time: 5 minutes
Servings: 1
Calories: 275
